root.description: Name to be used on all the resources as identifier
root.name: name

root.description: Whether resource attachments are automatically associated with the default association route table
root.name: enable_default_route_table_association

root.description: One or more IPv4 or IPv6 CIDR blocks for the transit gateway. Must be a size /24 CIDR block or larger for IPv4, or a size /64 CIDR block or larger for IPv6
root.name: transit_gateway_cidr_blocks

root.description: Additional tags for the TGW
root.name: tgw_tags

root.description: Additional tags for VPC attachments
root.name: tgw_vpc_attachment_tags

root.description: The name of the resource share of TGW
root.name: ram_name

root.description: A list of principals to share TGW with. Possible values are an AWS account ID, an AWS Organizations Organization ARN, or an AWS Organizations Organization Unit ARN
root.name: ram_principals

root.description: Whether resource attachments automatically propagate routes to the default propagation route table
root.name: enable_default_route_table_propagation

root.description: Whether multicast support is enabled
root.name: enable_multicast_support

root.description: Should be true to enable DNS support in the TGW
root.name: enable_dns_support

root.description: Should be true to enable encryption support in the TGW
root.name: enable_encryption_support

root.description: Maps of maps of VPC details to attach to TGW. Type 'any' to disable type validation by Terraform.
root.name: vpc_attachments

root.description: Whether to share your transit gateway with other accounts
root.name: share_tgw

root.description: The Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the Amazon side of the gateway. By default the TGW is created with the current default Amazon ASN.
root.name: amazon_side_asn

root.description: Indicates whether principals outside your organization can be associated with a resource share.
root.name: ram_allow_external_principals

root.description: ARN of RAM resource share
root.name: ram_resource_share_arn

root.description: Whether VPN Equal Cost Multipath Protocol support is enabled
root.name: enable_vpn_ecmp_support

root.description: Additional tags for the TGW route table
root.name: tgw_route_table_tags

root.description: Additional tags for the RAM
root.name: ram_tags

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: Controls if TGW should be created (it affects almost all resources)
root.name: create_tgw

root.description: Indicates whether to enable security group referencing support
root.name: enable_sg_referencing_support

root.description: Identifier of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table to use with the Target Gateway when reusing it between multiple TGWs
root.name: transit_gateway_route_table_id

root.description: Additional tags for the Default TGW route table
root.name: tgw_default_route_table_tags

root.description: Description of the EC2 Transit Gateway
root.name: description

root.description: Whether resource attachment requests are automatically accepted
root.name: enable_auto_accept_shared_attachments

root.description: Create, update, and delete timeout configurations for the transit gateway
root.name: timeouts

root.description: Controls if TGW Route Table / Routes should be created
root.name: create_tgw_routes

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Association attributes
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_association

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Resource Share and the principal, separated by a comma
root.name: ram_principal_association_id

root.description: Identifier of the default association route table
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_association_default_route_table_id

root.description: EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table identifier
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_id

root.description: Boolean whether this is the default association route table for the EC2 Transit Gateway
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_default_association_route_table

root.description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table identifier combined with destination
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_ids

root.description: Identifier of the default propagation route table
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_propagation_default_route_table_id

root.description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway VPC Attachment identifiers
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_vpc_attachment_ids

root.description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Propagation identifiers
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_propagation_ids

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource share
root.name: ram_resource_share_id

root.description: EC2 Transit Gateway Amazon Resource Name (ARN)
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_arn

root.description: EC2 Transit Gateway identifier
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_id

root.description: Identifier of the AWS account that owns the EC2 Transit Gateway
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_owner_id

root.description: Boolean whether this is the default propagation route table for the EC2 Transit Gateway
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_default_propagation_route_table

root.description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Propagation attributes
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_propagation

root.description: Map of EC2 Transit Gateway VPC Attachment attributes
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_vpc_attachment

root.description: List of EC2 Transit Gateway Route Table Association identifiers
root.name: ec2_transit_gateway_route_table_association_ids
